Lizzie awoke and her sleepy little face looked precious, and her morning voice was cute.
precious sleepy face and cute morning voice

Lizzie asked Alyssa to come to her meditation chamber about an hour after lunch, and when Alyssa entered, Lizzie was only wearing her undergarments, as usual when in the meditation chamber, with the Grand Admiral badge pinned to her bra, and her uniform folded neatly next to her chair. The holograms of artwork were different, with a vast majority being holos of sculptures. Lizzie shyly asked if Alyssa would be interested in being her girlfriend.

A few days later, Lizzie, Alyssa, and Mila went to the Industrious planet of Bastion, the temporary capital of the Empire. They took a shuttle down and went to the Imperial Capital building. Lizzie, as the current ruler of the empire, had business to take care of, with Alyssa following alongside and Mila standing intimidatingly in combat gear, armed heavily. They entered a conference room to meet with the council of Moffs. Lizzie brought up Zsinj, a former warlord who broke away and formed his own warlord kingdom, attempting to rebuild the empire his own way. Zsinj has the old Sith Worlds at the core of his empire, which he had almost since the start of his splinter empire, headquartered on Serenno. Lizzie wants the Sith Worlds. With Zsinj causing issues for both the Empire and the Republic, Lizzie believes the two sides might temporarily cease hostilities to partition Zsinj's empire.
Lizzie's plan to partition Zsinj's empire
temporary ceasefire with Republic to partition Zsinj's empire

A few days later, in the formerly-Imperial Palace on Coruscant, Mon Mothma, Chancellor of the Republic's Provisional Council, received word that the current leader of the Remnants of the Galactic Empire, Lizzie Ó Muirgheasa, wanted to speak with her. Lizzie refused to meet anywhere, instead choosing to speak over holoprojector.
